message:
fix(overlay): Wire AnalysisSidebar to OverlayProvider and add missing overlays

The AnalysisSidebar's tool buttons were not opening overlays when clicked.
Root cause: The component was using Zustand store's openOverlay() which only
updates state, but not OverlayProvider's open() which actually renders overlays.

AnalysisSidebar.tsx changes:
- Import useOverlay hook from OverlayProvider instead of relying on store
- Use the destructured open function: const { open: openOverlay } = useOverlay()
- Fix overlay ID mismatches that would cause silent failures:
  - 'non-b-dna' → 'nonBDNA' (matches OverlayId type)
  - 'structureConstraints' → 'structureConstraint' (matches OverlayId type)
  - 'mosaicRadar' → 'defenseArmsRace' (correct overlay name)

OverlayManager.tsx changes:
- Added 6 missing overlay component imports that were referenced in
  AnalysisSidebar but never rendered:
  - GCSkewOverlay
  - ComplexityOverlay
  - BendabilityOverlay
  - PromoterOverlay
  - RepeatsOverlay
  - KmerAnomalyOverlay
- Rendered all 6 components with proper repository and currentPhage props

This ensures all 25+ analysis tools in the sidebar are now fully functional
and will open their respective overlay panels when clicked.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
